facts: blood bank. It manages compatibility between blood types, monitors.
The system track blood units by ABO type, Rh factor, and collection date, with expiry fixed at 42 days after collection.
The system accept transfusion requests specifying blood type, Rh factor, and quantity.
The system match requests to compatible units using standard ABO/Rh donor compatibility (exact-type matches first, then closest expiry first).
The system reserve matched units, and release a reservation back to stock if it is not confirmed as issued within 24 hours.
The system automatically expire units past their expiry date and exclude them from matching.
The system raise a shortage alert whenever available stock of any blood type falls below 5 units.
The system show a dashboard of stock per type, units expiring within 7 days, and open requests.

evidence.claim: The system enables users to submit a transfusion request specifying blood type, Rh, and quantity.
evidence.fact: The system accept transfusion requests specifying blood type, Rh factor, and quantity.
